task_completion.description: Configure failsafe parameters to continue the mission upon connection loss
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the QGroundControl Parameters or Vehicle Setup screen, the parameters 'FS_THR_ENABLE' (Throttle Failsafe) and 'FS_GCS_ENABLE' (GCS Failsafe) should be visible and set to the value '2' (or 'Continue with Mission in Auto').

task_completion.description: Create a waypoint at the designated hilltop coordinates and altitude
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the QGroundControl Plan view, a waypoint item should be visible in the mission list with Latitude set to -35.358, Longitude set to 149.166, and Altitude set to 110 meters.

task_completion.description: Point the directional antenna at the specified heading
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the QGroundControl Plan view, a 'Set Yaw', 'Condition Yaw', or waypoint heading parameter should be visible and set to 245 degrees.

task_completion.description: Loiter at the waypoint for the required duration
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the QGroundControl Plan view, a 'Loiter Time', 'Hold', or delay command should be visible and set to 3600 seconds.

task_completion.description: Add a Return to Launch command at the end of the mission
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the QGroundControl Plan view, the final item in the mission sequence list on the right side of the screen should be a 'Return to Launch' (RTL) command.

task_completion.description: Save the mission plan to the correct file path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager window, terminal, or QGroundControl save dialog showing the file 'comm_relay.plan' successfully saved in the '/home/ga/Documents/QGC/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the QGroundControl GUI to create the mission plan
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent interacting with the QGroundControl application interface (Plan View, Parameters menu) rather than manually writing a JSON .plan file in a text editor.

integrity.description: The agent opened and read the deployment brief
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent opening '/home/ga/Documents/QGC/relay_deployment_brief.txt' using a text editor (like gedit or nano) or a terminal command (like cat) to obtain the mission parameters.

integrity.description: The mission plan is visually represented on the map
integrity.visual_evidence: The QGroundControl map view should display a genuine flight path with waypoint markers corresponding to the mission list, indicating actual interaction with the planning tool.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target mission plan must be saved to '/home/ga/Documents/QGC/comm_relay.plan'. The failsafe parameters FS_THR_ENABLE and FS_GCS_ENABLE must be set to 2. The mission must include a waypoint at latitude -35.358, longitude 149.166, with an altitude of 110 meters. The vehicle heading must be set to 245 degrees, and the loiter time must be exactly 3600 seconds.
